title: callitriche hamulata subsp. pedunculata
intro: Callitriche hamulata subsp. pedunculata, also known as water starwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Callitriche hamulata subsp. pedunculata include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and support kidney function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and its herbal preparations are typically used to treat a range of health issues.
